findings.title: Required idempotency receipt field list omitted matter_id and decision_reason
findings.details: The S10 receipt object included matter_id and decision_reason, and validators checked those values, but the requiredIdempotencyReceiptFields list recorded only the narrower minimum subset.
findings.required_action: Add matter_id and decision_reason to the S10 required receipt field list and mirrored contract, validator, and fixture evidence.

adjudication_notes: One completed claude-opus-4-8 max read-only/no-tools review is recorded for CP00-006.
Raw P2 CP00-006-P2-01 is fixed by adding matter_id and decision_reason to the S10 required idempotency receipt field list and mirrored validator, contract, and fixture evidence.
No unresolved P0, P1, or P2 findings remain after adjudication.
